# Newby's Automotive Center

> Henderson, Nevada's most-reviewed auto repair shop. Family-owned and ASE-certified since 2000, serving all makes and models. 4.9 stars from over 1,400 verified customer reviews.

## Key Facts
- Business: Newby's Automotive Center
- Type: Full-service auto repair shop (all makes & models, domestic & import)
- Owner: Conley Newby (family-owned)
- Founded: 2000
- Address: 1201 American Pacific Dr, Henderson, NV 89074
- Phone: (702) 897-9667
- Hours: Monday–Friday 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM; closed weekends
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 1,436 verified SureCritic reviews (95% five-star, NPS 96)
- Certifications: ASE-certified technicians, NAPA-affiliated, AAA-accredited, BBB-rated
- Warranty: most work and parts backed by nationwide warranty
- Service area: Henderson, Green Valley, Anthem, Seven Hills, Whitney Ranch, Boulder City, Las Vegas, North Las Vegas

## Services
- Brake repair & service (pads, rotors, calipers, ABS)
- Check engine light & computer diagnostics
- A/C & heating repair (recharge, compressor, climate control)
- Oil changes & scheduled maintenance (30/60/90/120K)
- Wheel alignment
- Suspension & steering (shocks, struts, control arms, power steering)
- Engine & transmission repair
- Electrical & electronic repair (battery, starter, alternator, ignition)

## How to book
The fastest way to schedule is to call (702) 897-9667. Appointment requests can also be submitted online at /contact.
